title: Black Channel Manga Switches to Weekly Coro Coro Comic Online Magazine
content: The May issue of Shogakukan 's Monthly Coro Coro Comics magazine revealed on Wednesday that Satoshi Kisaichi 's Black Channel manga will publish new chapters on Shogakukan 's Weekly Coro Coro Comic online magazine beginning on May 17.
author: ANN

title: Dragon Quest Smash/Grow Mobile Game Announces April 21 Worldwide Launch
content: Square Enix revealed in a new opening trailer for its Dragon Quest Smash/Grow mobile game on Tuesday the game will launch worldwide for iOS and Android on April 21 (April 20 PDT). Kamikaze Douga animated the below opening video.
author: ANN

title: Controversial Blue Lock Studio Confirms New Fantasy Anime
content: Blue Lock began serialization in 2018 and eventually became one of the best-selling series of all time, with over 50 million copies in circulation worldwide. The series has been on a roll since its debut, winning the 45th Kodansha Manga Award in the Shonen category in 2021, along with receiving several praises from…
author: ComicBook

title: 5 Years Later, Controversial Isekai Anime Is Finally Coming to Netflix
content: The exciting Spring 2026 anime season is finally here, and Netflix is bringing a new list of series to the platform. The streaming giant kicked off the year with some of the most gorgeous and exciting anime of all time, including Cosmic Princess Kaguya and Love Through a Prism .
author: ComicBook

title: 'Future GPX Cyber Formula' Gets Short Anime Sequel
content: Production company Bandai Namco Filmworks announced a new short anime for Future GPX Cyber Formula on Wednesday, commemorating the anime series' 35th anniversary. The official website also revealed a 35th anniversary visual (pictured) and a promotional video.
author: MyAnimeList

title: Dorohedoro Anime Season 2 Unveils English Dub's Cast
content: Crunchyroll announced on Wednesday an English dub for the second anime season based on Q Hayashida 's Dorohedoro manga. The dub launched on the same day. The English cast includes: • Aleks Le as Caiman • Griffin Burns as Shin • Cherami Leigh as Noi • Alejandro Saab as Risu • Bill Butts as Kento • Christopher Corey…
author: ANN

title: Seven Seas Licenses The Berserker NPC Unknowingly Destroys the World, 4 More Titles
content: Seven Seas Entertainment announced the following licenses on Wednesday: Title: Yes, No, or Maybe? audiobook Creator(s): Michi Ichiho , Lala Takemiya Release Date: April 16 (volume 1, Siren imprint) Summary: Kunieda Kei is the up-and-coming Prince Charming of the evening news.
author: ANN

title: Always a Catch! Anime Casts Yūko Kaida
content: The official website for the television anime of Mayo Momoyo 's Always a Catch! ( Nigashita Sakana wa Ōkikatta ga Tsuriageta Sakana ga Ōkisugita Ken ) light novel series announced on Thursday it has cast Yūko Kaida as Queen Rubini, Renato and Placido's mother.
author: ANN

title: Pan Dorobō Anime's 2nd Promo Video Reveals Main Cast, Ending Theme Song
content: Kadokawa revealed on Thursday the second promotional video and main cast member for the anime of Keiko Shibata 's Pan Dorobō (Bread Thief) picture book. The video reveals and previews the ending theme song "Pan Dorobо̄" by Kyary Pamyu Pamyu : Ayaka Asai stars as Pan Dorobō . Takahiko Kyōgoku ( Love Live!
author: ANN

title: Avatar: The Last Airbender Fans Are Convinced Its Leaked Movie Can Recover With 1 Change
content: Avatar: The Last Airbender ‘s upcoming movie, The Legend of Aang: The Last Airbender , has dealt with delays and scrapped plans for a theatrical run in the lead-up to its release. And the obstacles continued this week, with The Last Airbender movie leaking online months ahead of its October debut.
author: ComicBook
